requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radio Frequency Interference and Spectrum Management
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——射频干扰与频谱管理
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——射頻干擾與頻譜管理

summary.en: Papua New Guinea regulates radio frequency spectrum use through NICTA under the NICTA Act 2009. Wireless devices must not cause harmful interference to authorized spectrum users. NICTA type approval process includes review of RF emission characteristics. PNG does not have a standalone national EMC standard; NICTA may reference international or Australian (AS/NZS CISPR) standards as technical benchmarks during type approval evaluation.
summary.zh: 巴布亚新几内亚依据《NICTA法》2009年通过NICTA管理无线电频谱使用。无线设备不得对授权频谱用户造成有害干扰。NICTA型式核准程序包括对射频发射特性的审查。PNG尚无独立的国家电磁兼容标准；NICTA在型式核准评估中可能参考国际标准或澳大利亚（AS/NZS CISPR）标准作为技术基准。
summary.zht: 巴布亞紐幾內亞依據《NICTA法》2009年透過NICTA管理無線電頻譜使用。無線設備不得對授權頻譜用戶造成有害干擾。NICTA型式核准程序包括對射頻發射特性的審查。PNG尚無獨立的國家電磁相容標準；NICTA在型式核准評估中可能參考國際標準或澳洲（AS/NZS CISPR）標準作為技術基準。

summary.en: China requires compliance with GB/T 9254 (CISPR 32 equivalent) for EMC emissions and GB/T 17626 series for immunity. SRRC type approval covers RF interference assessment. Products must not cause harmful interference to the national radio environment.
summary.zh: 中国要求符合GB/T 9254（CISPR 32等效标准）电磁兼容发射要求及GB/T 17626系列抗扰度要求。SRRC型式核准涵盖射频干扰评估。产品不得对国家无线电环境造成有害干扰。
summary.zht: 中國要求符合GB/T 9254（CISPR 32等效標準）電磁相容發射要求及GB/T 17626系列抗擾度要求。SRRC型式核准涵蓋射頻干擾評估。產品不得對國家無線電環境造成有害干擾。

gap.en: PNG has no standalone national EMC framework separate from the NICTA type approval process. Chinese GB/T EMC compliance documents may be submitted as supporting evidence, but NICTA type approval is the controlling requirement. AS/NZS CISPR-based test reports are more likely to be accepted as reference evidence than Chinese GB equivalents.
gap.zh: PNG尚无独立于NICTA型式核准程序之外的国家电磁兼容框架。中国GB/T电磁兼容合规文件可作为支持证据提交，但NICTA型式核准是主控要求。基于AS/NZS CISPR的测试报告比中国GB等效标准更易被接受为参考证据。
gap.zht: PNG尚無獨立於NICTA型式核准程序之外的國家電磁相容框架。中國GB/T電磁相容合規文件可作為支持證據提交，但NICTA型式核准是主控要求。基於AS/NZS CISPR的測試報告比中國GB等效標準更易被接受為參考證據。

source.publisher: National Information and Communications Technology Authority (NICTA), Papua New Guinea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] PNG EMC compliance is assessed within the NICTA type approval process; there is no separate PNG EMC mark or registration. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports may be submitted as supporting documentation, but AS/NZS CISPR-based reports are more likely to be recognized. Exporters should confirm current NICTA accepted standards before preparing test reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] PNG电磁兼容合规在NICTA型式核准程序中进行评估；无独立的PNG电磁兼容标志或注册要求。中国GB/T电磁兼容测试报告可作为支持文件提交，但基于AS/NZS CISPR的报告更易被认可。出口商在准备测试报告前应确认NICTA当前接受的标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] PNG電磁相容合規在NICTA型式核准程序中進行評估；無獨立的PNG電磁相容標誌或註冊要求。中國GB/T電磁相容測試報告可作為支持文件提交，但基於AS/NZS CISPR的報告更易被認可。出口商在準備測試報告前應確認NICTA當前接受的標準。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Conducted and Radiated Emissions from Wireless Devices
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——无线设备的传导与辐射发射
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——無線設備的傳導與輻射發射

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices supplied in Papua New Guinea must not generate conducted or radiated emissions that exceed acceptable limits causing interference to other users or equipment. NICTA type approval review covers these characteristics. PNG follows general ITU and, in practice, Australian AS/NZS CISPR emission frameworks as reference benchmarks, given the absence of a distinct national EMC standard body.
summary.zh: 在巴布亚新几内亚供应的无线及物联网设备，不得产生超过可接受限值的传导或辐射发射，从而对其他用户或设备造成干扰。NICTA型式核准审查涵盖上述特性。由于PNG尚无独立的国家电磁兼容标准机构，PNG参照ITU总体标准，并在实践中以澳大利亚AS/NZS CISPR发射框架作为参考基准。
summary.zht: 在巴布亞紐幾內亞供應的無線及物聯網裝置，不得產生超過可接受限值的傳導或輻射發射，從而對其他用戶或設備造成干擾。NICTA型式核准審查涵蓋上述特性。由於PNG尚無獨立的國家電磁相容標準機構，PNG參照ITU總體標準，並在實踐中以澳洲AS/NZS CISPR發射框架作為參考基準。

summary.en: Chinese devices must comply with GB/T 9254 for conducted and radiated emissions (equivalent to CISPR 32) and relevant GB/T 17626 immunity standards. Test reports from CNAS-accredited labs are required for SRRC and CCC certification.
summary.zh: 中国设备须符合GB/T 9254传导及辐射发射要求（等效于CISPR 32）及相关GB/T 17626抗扰度标准。SRRC及CCC认证须提供CNAS认可实验室出具的测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國設備須符合GB/T 9254傳導及輻射發射要求（等效於CISPR 32）及相關GB/T 17626抗擾度標準。SRRC及CCC認證須提供CNAS認可實驗室出具的測試報告。

gap.en: Chinese GB/T emission test reports may not be directly accepted by NICTA. Obtaining AS/NZS CISPR-based test reports from accredited laboratories improves the likelihood of NICTA acceptance as supporting evidence for the type approval application.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T发射测试报告可能不被NICTA直接接受。从认可实验室获取基于AS/NZS CISPR的测试报告，可提高其作为型式核准申请支持证据被NICTA接受的可能性。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T發射測試報告可能不被NICTA直接接受。從認可實驗室取得基於AS/NZS CISPR的測試報告，可提高其作為型式核准申請支持證據被NICTA接受的可能性。

source.publisher: National Information and Communications Technology Authority (NICTA), Papua New Guinea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Conducted and radiated emission compliance is assessed through the NICTA type approval process. Exporters should obtain AS/NZS CISPR-based test reports from accredited laboratories to support NICTA type approval applications. Verify current NICTA accepted test standards before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 传导及辐射发射合规通过NICTA型式核准程序进行评估。出口商应从认可实验室获取基于AS/NZS CISPR的测试报告，以支持NICTA型式核准申请。出货前须确认NICTA当前接受的测试标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 傳導及輻射發射合規透過NICTA型式核准程序進行評估。出口商應從認可實驗室取得基於AS/NZS CISPR的測試報告，以支持NICTA型式核准申請。出貨前須確認NICTA當前接受的測試標準。
